name_en: Arab Gulf States Institute in Washington
description: Washington-based research institution focused on the Arab Gulf states and their relationship with the United States. Hosts fellows studying Gulf politics, security, and economy, including senior fellow [Ali Alfoneh](/people/ali-alfoneh) whose work on the IRGC has been influential in policy circles.

sources.title: About AGSIW
sources.publisher: Arab Gulf States Institute in Washington
